latin: die natali Dudlei familia hortum serpentium visitavit. Harrius cum magno serpente Brasiliano per vitrum locutus est. serpens oculis signum dedit quasi intellegeret. tum vitrum subito evanuit. serpens e carcere suo elapsus est et per pavimentum reptavit. homines clamabant et fugiebant. Dudley intra vitrum captus mansit.

questions.prompt: Why was the family at the zoo?
What did Harry do with the snake?
questions.target: He spoke with it through the glass
choices: He spoke with it through the glass
He drew a picture of it

questions.target: He was trapped inside the glass enclosure
choices: He was trapped inside the glass enclosure

translation: On Dudley's birthday the family visited the reptile house. Harry spoke with a large Brazilian snake through the glass. The snake gave a sign with its eyes as if it understood. Then the glass suddenly vanished. The snake escaped from its enclosure and crawled across the floor. People were shouting and fleeing. Dudley remained trapped inside the glass.
